examples: Greenpeace managed to assemble a small flotilla of inflatable boats to waylay the ship at sea.
The accompanying flotilla of dorados schools (up to 50 now) can be seen more easily, their astonishing blueness picked up by torchlight.
Epstein had planned to be aboard the flotilla and Peck was.
This archive footage shows the huge flotilla of boats that came out to greet him.
All but two of the boats in the flotilla are larger than 30 feet.
